# Roadmap

## 0.1.2 — delivered

- stdlib-first architecture;
- curl-style HTTP/HTTPS client and atomic downloads;
- Puma-style server config and worker planning;
- source routes, resource routes, controllers, JSON responses, EHY views, and Jobs helpers;
- package verification and continuation tooling.

## 0.1.3

- cookies, signed sessions, form decoding, named routes, richer route scopes;
- request specs and fake transport helpers;
- streaming response conveniences and structured access logging.

## 0.1.4

- multipart uploads, conditional/range responses, graceful drain/restart contracts;
- reverse-proxy headers and production deployment examples.

## Later

- HTTP/2/3, connection pooling, WebSockets, and native server-side TLS when the stdlib/runtime contracts exist.
